Refusal threshold

Embedment = Start Z − End Z. Any driven pile with embedment below this value is classified as a refusal. Default 10.25 ft.

Export

Exports include only the layers currently visible on the map (piles by classification + any reference layers toggled on). KMZ opens in Google Earth.
